session.user:
Perform an import migration across the codebase at /home/runner/work/erk/erk.
## Migration Rules
### Rule 1: context_for_test import (61 files) Change: ```python from erk.core.context import context_for_test ``` to: ```python from tests.test_utils.test_context import context_for_test ```
### Rule 2: minimal_context import (1 file) Change: ```python from erk.core.context import minimal_context ``` to: ```python from tests.test_utils.test_context import minimal_context ```
### Important - Some files may import `context_for_test` alongside other things from `erk.core.context` (like `ErkContext`, `create_context`, `GlobalConfig`, etc.). In those cases, only move the `context_for_test` import — keep other imports from `erk.core.context`. - For example, if you see: ```python from erk.core.context import ErkContext, context_for_test ``` Change to: ```python from erk.core.context import ErkContext from tests.test_utils.test_context import context_for_test ``` - Search ALL `.py` files under tests/, packages/, and src/ - Also check if `tests/test_utils/builders.py` imports `context_for_test` from `erk.core.context` — if so, migrate it too
session.assistant: I'll perform this import migration across the codebase. Let me start by finding all files that need to be updated.
session.tool_result:
Found 68 files tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_merge_pr.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_create_learn_issue.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_run_validation_pipeline.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_resolve_target.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_resolve_plan_id.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_run_execution_pipeline.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/pipeline/test_validate_pr.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_extract_diff.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_link_pr_to_objective_nodes.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_run_pipeline.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_enhance_with_graphite.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_finalize_pr.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_capture_existing_pr_body.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_label_code_pr.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_cleanup_impl_for_submit.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_core_submit_flow.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_prepare_state.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_commit_wip.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_extract_diff_and_fetch_plan_context.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_and_create_pr.py tests/unit/cli/commands/slot/test_common.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_metadata_helpers.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_resolvers.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_validate_pr_for_landing.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_cleanup_and_navigate.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py

1→"""Test data builders for common scenarios. 2→ 3→This module provides fluent APIs for building test data, reducing setup duplication 4→across the test suite. 1→"""Unit tests for dry-run mode in land command cleanup.""" 2→ 3→from datetime import UTC, datetime 4→from pathlib import Path 5→ 6→from click.testing import CliRunner 7→ 8→from erk.cli.commands.land_cmd import _cleanup_and_navigate 9→from erk.core.context import context_for_test 10→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 11→from erk.core.worktree_pool import PoolState, SlotAssignment, load_pool_state, save_pool_state 12→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 13→from tests.fakes.gateway.graphite import FakeGraphite 14→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import WorktreeInfo 15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import GitHubRepoId 16→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_inmem_env 17→ 18→ 19→def _create_test_assignment( 20→ slot_name: str, 21→ branch_name: str, 22→ worktree_path: Path, 23→) -> SlotAssignment: 24→ """Create a test assignment with current timestamp.""" 25→ return SlotAssignment( 26→ slot_name=slot_name, 27→ branch_name=branch_name, 28→ assigned_at=datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(), 29→ worktree_path=worktree_path, 30→ )
... [5 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Tests for the ErkContext.""" 2→ 3→from pathlib import Path 4→ 5→import pytest 6→ 7→from erk.core.context import context_for_test, minimal_context 8→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 9→from erk_shared.context.types import GlobalConfig 10→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 11→from tests.fakes.gateway.github import FakeLocalGitHub 12→from tests.fakes.gateway.graphite import FakeGraphite 13→from tests.fakes.gateway.shell import FakeShell 14→from tests.test_utils.paths import sentinel_path 15→ 16→ 17→def test_context_initialization_and_attributes() -> None: 18→ """Initialization wires through every dependency and exposes them as attributes.""" 19→ git_ops = FakeGit() 20→ github_ops = FakeLocalGitHub() 21→ graphite_ops = FakeGraphite() 22→ shell_ops = FakeShell() 23→ global_config = GlobalConfig.test(Path("/tmp"), use_graphite=False, shell_setup_complete=False) 24→ 25→ ctx = context_for_test( 26→ git=git_ops, 27→ github=github_ops, 28→ graphite=graphite_ops, 29→ shell=shell_ops, 30→ cwd=sentinel_path(),

session.assistant: Ah! There's a syntax error in `env_helpers.py` - the LibCST transformation left a trailing comma. Let me check and fix it:
session.tool_result:
1→"""Centralized test environment helpers for simulating erk scenarios. 2→ 3→This module provides helpers for setting up realistic erk test environments 4→with Click's CliRunner. It provides two patterns: 5→ 6→1. erk_isolated_fs_env(): Filesystem-based (uses isolated_filesystem(), 7→ creates real directories) 8→2. erk_inmem_env(): In-memory (uses fakes only, no filesystem I/O) 9→ 10→Key Components: 11→ - ErkIsolatedFsEnv: Helper class for filesystem-based testing 12→ - ErkInMemEnv: Helper class for in-memory testing 13→ - erk_isolated_fs_env(): Context manager for filesystem-based tests 14→ - erk_inmem_env(): Context manager for in-memory tests 15→ 16→Usage Pattern: 17→ 18→ Before (raw isolated_filesystem pattern - 20-30 lines per test): 19→ ```python 20→ def test_something() -> None: 21→ runner = CliRunner() 22→ with runner.isolated_filesystem(): 23→ cwd = Path.cwd() 24→ git_dir = cwd / ".git" 25→ git_dir.mkdir() 26→ erk_root = cwd / "erks" 27→ erk_root.mkdir() 28→ 29→ git = FakeGit(git_common_dirs={cwd: git_dir}) 30→ global_config = GlobalConfig.test(...)
... [70 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant: I see the issue - line 89 has a trailing comma. This happened because the original import likely had `ErkContext, context_for_test` on one line, and when the script split them, it left a trailing comma. Let me fix this:
session.tool_result:
